details.feature: SciFigure Pro integrates seamlessly with ImageJ/Fiji, GraphPad Prism, Photoshop, Illustrator
Mobile recording is supported via the iOS app (Android in beta)
No technical setup or manual uploading required
After the meeting, the AI generates a summary within 2 minutes
Permanently deleted data can be exported beforehand in JSON or PDF format
Fitness Challenge Tracker has a community of 500,000+ users
